name: Create users
description: Allows creating new user accounts in the system.

name: Edit users
description: Allows updating user account information such as names, contact details, and other profile information.

name: Suspend users
description: Allows suspending user accounts to prevent them from accessing the system without permanently deleting the accounts.

name: Reset passwords
description: Allows resetting user passwords and initiating password recovery for user accounts.

name: Assign roles
description: Allows assigning, changing, or removing roles for users to control their access levels.

name: Assign properties
description: Allows assigning one or more properties or apartments to users for management or access purposes.

name: Activate/Deactivate accounts
description: Allows activating or deactivating user accounts to enable or disable system access.
